Popular Questions

A standard pallet covers 500 sq ft (about 450 rolls).

Sod costs $0.30–$0.80 per sq ft installed, or $0.15–$0.40 per sq ft for materials only.

Bermudagrass, Zoysia, and Bahiagrass thrive in full sun with 6+ hours of direct sunlight.

Measure your lawn's length and width in feet, multiply them for square footage, then divide by the roll size (typically 10 sq ft). Add 10% for waste.
